style_effects: Constant, vibrant blue-white static sparks dance around Dratini's body, drifting upward like glowing fireflies. A pulsing electric aura of electric blue radiates from its eyes and tail, distorting the air with faint, crackling energy waves. The lighting mood is a sharp, energetic glow with cool white highlights accenting its sleek form. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
